items.title: 30th Celebration Pokémon Center ETB observed for preorder in Canada

product.name: 30th Celebration Pokémon Center Elite Trainer Box

facts: The Canadian storefront exposed a purchasable preorder listing at CA$80.99.

items.title: 30th Celebration Pokémon Center ETB observed sold out in Canada

product.name: 30th Celebration Pokémon Center Elite Trainer Box

facts: The Canadian listing was observed sold out after the preorder opportunity opened.
items.expectedAction: Record the closed opportunity; do not raise a restock watch without an explicit restock message.

items.title: Canadian retailer preorder page observed for the 30th Celebration UPC Day version
facts: A Canadian retailer page advertises a Day and Night bundle as a preorder.
This is not evidence of a Pokémon Center Canada listing or a fair-price offer.
items.expectedAction: Prepare now and continue watching for a fair-price Pokémon Center Canada or major-retailer listing.

items.title: Canadian retailer preorder page observed for the 30th Celebration UPC Night version
facts: A Canadian retailer page advertises a Day and Night bundle as a preorder.
This is not evidence of a Pokémon Center Canada listing or a fair-price offer.
items.expectedAction: Prepare now and continue watching for a fair-price Pokémon Center Canada or major-retailer listing.

items.title: Walmart Canada confirms Pitch Black retail availability from July 17
facts: Walmart Canada says the Pitch Black Elite Trainer Box and three-pack blister are available in participating stores from opening on July 17.
Quantities are limited and store-specific availability can change.
items.expectedAction: Show live-now with the dated Canadian retailer evidence; do not forecast a future first-listing date.

items.title: Pitch Black launch inventory reported sold out in Canada
facts: The limited launch inventory was reported sold out after the July 17 Canadian retail opportunity.
No explicit restock announcement has been observed.
items.expectedAction: Move the released product to the historical catalog and remove it from the active early-signal radar.
